tasks.subject: [flow-plugin-extraction] [P1] Scaffold the plugins/flow/ skeleton, manifests, and dev package.json in the marketplace repo
tasks.description: Act in the marketplace repo at /Users/doriancollier/Keep/dork-os/marketplace. Create the plugin root plugins/flow/ and its empty directory skeleton: commands/, skills/, hooks/, scripts/, engine-tests/, adapters/, config/, docs/. Author three files. (1) plugins/flow/.dork/manifest.json: the DorkOS package manifest with schemaVersion 1, name "flow", type "plugin", a version (start 0.1.0), description, author "Dork Labs", license MIT, tags, category, icon, and layers ["commands","skills","hooks"] (scripts/, adapters/, config/ are plain plugin files referenced by the skills, NOT Claude Code layers, so they are excluded from the layers array). Mirror the field shape of an existing plugin manifest such as plugins/marketplace-dev/.dork/manifest.json. (2) plugins/flow/.claude-plugin/plugin.json: the Claude Code plugin manifest with name "flow", version, and description (so `claude --plugin-dir` and `claude plugin install` load it). (3) plugins/flow/package.json: the plugin's DEV-only manifest, derived from the source engine package.json at dorkos branch spec-flow-marketplace-package path .agents/flow/engine/package.json (read it with `git -C /Users/doriancollier/Keep/dork-os/dorkos show spec-flow-marketplace-package:.agents/flow/engine/package.json`). Transform it: rename to "flow" (private true, type module); REMOVE esbuild from devDependencies and REMOVE the "build" script (the esbuild .mjs build is dropped); REMOVE the workspace:* devDeps @dorkos/eslint-config and @dorkos/typescript-config (they cannot resolve outside the dorkos workspace) and either drop linting config or add a standalone eslint config; keep zod as a DEV dependency only (used to author config.schema.json and run schema tests), plus vitest, tsx, @types/node, ajv, ajv-formats, prettier; keep the "test", "typecheck", and "generate:schema" scripts; remove the "exports"/"dist" mappings since there is no build output. Also create a placeholder plugins/flow/README.md (the install/maintainer overview, filled in task 1.4). Acceptance: `ls plugins/flow` shows commands/ skills/ hooks/ scripts/ engine-tests/ adapters/ config/ docs/ plus .dork/manifest.json, .claude-plugin/plugin.json, package.json, README.md; the .dork/manifest.json parses as JSON with type "plugin" and layers exactly ["commands","skills","hooks"]; `node -e "require('./plugins/flow/package.json')"` (run from the marketplace repo root) succeeds and the parsed package.json contains no esbuild dependency and no build script. Note: this work lives only in the marketplace repo clone; pushing it to the dork-labs/marketplace remote is outward-facing and the EXECUTE stage confirms before any push.
tasks.activeForm: Scaffolding the plugins/flow skeleton and manifests

tasks.subject: [flow-plugin-extraction] [P1] Port the engine source and oracle CLI wrappers into scripts/ as runnable .ts and drop the esbuild .mjs build
tasks.description: Act in the marketplace repo at /Users/doriancollier/Keep/dork-os/marketplace, porting source out of the dorkos branch spec-flow-marketplace-package (read with `git -C /Users/doriancollier/Keep/dork-os/dorkos show spec-flow-marketplace-package:<path>`; list the tree with `git -C /Users/doriancollier/Keep/dork-os/dorkos ls-tree -r --name-only spec-flow-marketplace-package -- .agents/flow/engine`). This is the core .mjs-to-.ts conversion that makes the source itself the runtime. Move the full engine source tree from .agents/flow/engine/src/ (19 modules: the pure oracles dispatch.ts, calibration.ts, gates.ts, flow-run.ts, events.ts, config-schema.ts, work-item.ts, plus the supporting server-engine modules transport.ts, reconcilers.ts, scheduler.ts, reconciler.ts, flow-state.ts, comms.ts, comment-response.ts, identity.ts, evidence.ts, tasks-schema.ts, generate-config-schema.ts, index.ts) into plugins/flow/scripts/ as .ts. Move the five CLI wrappers from .agents/flow/engine/cli/ (_shared.ts, dispatch.ts, gates.ts, involvement.ts, recovery.ts; defer validate-config.ts handling to task 1.6) into plugins/flow/scripts/ as the runnable entrypoints. Convert the dependency-free committed script .agents/flow/scripts/validate-adapter.mjs into plugins/flow/scripts/validate-adapter.ts (it has no zod dependency, so this is a straight .mjs-to-.ts rename plus type annotations). The server-engine modules are kept (not deleted) because they carry live vitest tests and the no-dead-code rule applies; they ride along as importable .ts modules. Fix every relative import so the graph loads under `node --experimental-strip-types`: rewrite `.js` import specifiers that currently point at sibling source (for example `import { X } from '../src/foo.js'` in the old cli wrappers) to the new flat plugins/flow/scripts/ layout with explicit `.ts` extensions (Node type-stripping requires the real on-disk extension). Drop the esbuild build entirely: do NOT copy .agents/flow/engine/build.mjs, and do NOT copy any committed .agents/flow/scripts/*.mjs oracle artifact (dispatch.mjs, gates.mjs, involvement.mjs, recovery.mjs, validate-config.mjs); the .ts files are the shipped runtime. Acceptance: from the marketplace repo, `node --experimental-strip-types plugins/flow/scripts/dispatch.ts --help` prints the dispatch CLI help and exits 0; the same runs for gates.ts, involvement.ts, recovery.ts, and validate-adapter.ts; `grep -rn "\.mjs" plugins/flow/scripts` finds no oracle build artifacts; no build.mjs exists under plugins/flow/; the pure oracle entrypoints import nothing at runtime beyond their sibling .ts modules (all type-only imports erased).
tasks.activeForm: Porting the engine source and CLI wrappers into runnable .ts

tasks.subject: [flow-plugin-extraction] [P1] Rework validate-config to a zero-runtime-dependency check against the committed config.schema.json
tasks.description: Act in the marketplace repo at /Users/doriancollier/Keep/dork-os/marketplace. The source validate-config CLI (dorkos branch spec-flow-marketplace-package, .agents/flow/engine/cli/validate-config.ts) imports FlowConfigSchema from config-schema.ts and relied on esbuild to bundle zod into the shipped .mjs. The esbuild build is gone, and the shipped runtime must carry no runtime dependency, so rework this oracle. Author plugins/flow/scripts/validate-config.ts as a runnable entrypoint that reads a config object from stdin (or --input <path>) and validates it against the committed JSON Schema at plugins/flow/config/config.schema.json (loaded by reading the file, not by importing zod), using a small embedded structural validator (or ajv if it is acceptable as a runtime dependency-free vendored check; prefer a minimal hand-written check so the shipped path stays dependency-free per the spec). It emits { ok: true, config } on success and { ok: false, errors } on failure, with exit 0 valid / 1 invalid, diagnostics to stderr, and a --help. Keep plugins/flow/scripts/config-schema.ts (the zod schema, moved in task 1.5) as a DEV-only module: it is imported by generate-config-schema.ts to regenerate config.schema.json and by the config-schema vitest, never by the shipped validate-config path. Confirm zod appears only in plugins/flow/package.json devDependencies (task 1.1), never imported by validate-config.ts. Acceptance: `node --experimental-strip-types plugins/flow/scripts/validate-config.ts --help` runs and exits 0; piping plugins/flow/config/config.json into it returns { ok: true } with exit 0; piping a deliberately invalid config returns { ok: false } with a precise error list and exit 1; `grep -n "zod" plugins/flow/scripts/validate-config.ts` finds no import of zod.
tasks.activeForm: Reworking validate-config to a zero-dependency schema check

tasks.description: Act in the marketplace repo at /Users/doriancollier/Keep/dork-os/marketplace, editing the copied surfaces from tasks 1.2 and 1.3.
